query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_messages` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `conversationId` int NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','assistant','system') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_messages` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `conversationId` int NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','assistant','system') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
